nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Admin session. Body: { submission_id, override_pct? }. Reads the submission + parent carrier's expected_commission_pct, calculates first-year commission (annual_premium × commission_pct × first_year_factor), inserts or updates the carrier_commissions row with status='expected'. First-year factor defaults to 1.0 for P&C, 0.5 for term-life (Canadian convention varies; carrier-specific tuning via override_pct).
